app.deleteAccountText: This action will permanently delete your account and all related data, including workouts, measurements and progress history.

landing.coreFeaturesSubtitle: Everything you need to reach your fitness goals in one place.

workoutLogging.title: Workout Logging
workoutLogging.text: Log every workout with ease. Track sets, reps, and weight without breaking your flow.

bodyMeasurements.title: Body Measurements
bodyMeasurements.text: See how your body changes over time. Keep track of weight and key measurements in one place.

analytics.title: Analytics & Charts
analytics.text: Understand your progress with clear, visual stats — from strength gains to training volume.

macroCalculator.title: Macro Calculator
macroCalculator.text: Find your ideal calories and macros based on your goals. No guesswork needed.

register.title: Welcome to Workout Tracker!
register.subtitle: Create your account
register.fixFormErrors: Please correct the errors in the form.

login.title: Welcome back!
login.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.

home.subtitle: Here is your fitness overview. Track your workouts, body measurements and progress in one place.

weightProgress.title: Weight Progress
weightProgress.subtitle: Your body weight changes over time
weightProgress.emptyText: Add your first measurement to start tracking your weight progress.

overview.title: Overview
overview.subtitle: Quick summary of your latest data

measurements.emptyText: Add your first body measurement to see your stats here.

nutrition.emptyText: Fill in your profile to calculate daily calories and macros.

history.title: Workout History
history.subtitle: View and manage your past workouts
history.empty: No workouts yet. Start by creating a new workout.

snackbar.failed: Failed to save workout. Please try again.

errors.invalidSets: Please correct the errors in the sets before saving
errors.noExercises: Add at least one exercise before saving
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

measurements.title: Body Measurements
measurements.subtitle: Track your body composition over time
measurements.selectBodyParts: Select body parts above to start logging your progress.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: View and manage your past entries

messages.saveError: An error occurred while saving. Please try again.
messages.noDataForPart: No data found for {part} in your history yet.

macros.title: Macros Calculator
macros.subtitle: Enter your metrics to calculate daily requirements
macros.disclaimer: * Note: These calculations are estimates based on general formulas. Individual needs may vary. Consult with a professional for precise nutrition planning.

messages.serverError: Server error. Please try again later.
messages.loadError: Could not load your profile. Please refresh the page.

sedentary.title: [1.25] Sedentary
sedentary.subtitle: Office job, walking < 1h, or 1 light workout per week

light.title: [1.3] Light Activity
light.subtitle: 2-3 low-intensity workouts (yoga, dancing, pool) per week

moderate.title: [1.35] Moderate Activity
moderate.subtitle: 2-3 moderate workouts (gym, fitness, cardio) per week

high.title: [1.375] High Activity
high.subtitle: Stable 3+ intense workouts per week (50 min+)

athlete.title: [1.45] Athlete / Pro
athlete.subtitle: 5+ intense workouts per week or daily training

maintenance.title: Maintenance
maintenance.subtitle: Keep your current weight and stay fit

loss.title: Weight Loss
loss.subtitle: Burn fat with a safe calorie deficit

gain.title: Muscle Gain
gain.subtitle: Build muscle with a slight calorie surplus
